name: Roseann Cacaci
review: From the first time meeting with Dr. Lam and staff I loved them. I never felt comfortable with dentists, but with Dr. Lam I felt completely at ease. I have 3 implants now and one tooth had to be pulled the grafted and an implant put in which was done all at once. I had no pain some swelling but all in all a great experience. Dr. Lam is AMAZING!! I highly recommend this office.

name: Judith Catarella
review: Dr. Hoffman did my implants over 30 years ago and they are still strong as ever. That is why when I needed another implant I traveled from NJ to SI for his best of class skills. His staff and his knowledge of implants and surgery truly represent excellent best practices to model. He is truly a leader in his field. Thank you all!

name: Gloria Morales
review: Dr. Goodenough took very good care of me. I had to get my tooth pulled. He explained what would happen before, during, and after the procedure. I was interested in an implant. He did the grafting directly. Normally, I have anxiety when I enter any an Oral Surgeon’s Office. Doctor’s knowledge and great bedside manners, reassured me that I’m in good hands.

name: Anna Accarino
review: I found this group and had Dr. Emad Abdou as my oral surgeon. Love this man, love this office. Everyone is very patient, sweet and helpful. Dr. Emad himself is a doll and an excellent surgeon. If you’re looking for a good supportive place to have work done. Look no further. The best!!! 10 stars if I could rate that high. Hope this is helpful in your time of need!
